name: 内格夫 | 凤凰徽记
descriptionEn: The Negev is a beast that can keep the enemy at bay with its pin-point supressive fire, provided you have the luxury of time to gain control over it. A multicolored pattern of various Phoenix Connexion graffiti has been applied. \"We cannot be killed!\"
descriptionZh: 子弹极多，射速极快的内格夫非常适合在多数回合中快速清场，作为交换，它的价格极其不菲，具有高扩散和令人发狂的后坐力。 这把武器饰有彩色的凤凰商号涂鸦图案。 烈火中堕落, 一定是那不死的凤凰。
